name: optivus-functions
description: Legacy Spark-inactive Cloud Functions reference for Optivus

scripts.serve: node -e "console.error('Legacy Firebase Functions are Spark-inactive. Use Cloudflare Workers instead.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.shell: node -e "console.error('Legacy Firebase Functions shell is disabled for Spark-only architecture.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.deploy: node -e "console.error('Firebase Functions deploy is disabled. Do not deploy Blaze-only Functions.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.logs: node -e "console.error('Firebase Functions logs are disabled for Spark-only architecture.'); process.exit(1)"
